name: offline-cfb
description: Offline dynasty desk for EA Sports College Football saves
author: CFB Offline contributors

scripts.desktop: npm run web:build && cross-env CFB_ELECTRON_DEV=0 npx electron .
scripts.dist: npm run web:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npx electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:win: npm run web:build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false npx electron-builder --win --x64 --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:mac: npm run web:build && npx electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:linux: npm run web:build && npx electron-builder --linux AppImage --config electron-builder.yml
